caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a tall, grey, stylized wig is seated in a studio setting. He wears large black headphones and sits behind a black microphone. The background consists of a wall filled with framed photographs and posters, with a "LEE" logo visible on a garment hanging nearby. The logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" appears in red and white text on the screen. Across the sequence, the man remains seated and speaks, with slight movements of his head and mouth as he talks into the microphone. His posture remains relatively consistent, while his facial expressions shift slightly as he continues his delivery. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the chest up.
